description: Set up the Python 3.12 virtual environment with all dependencies (including boto3) and verify existing tests pass.
steps: Create .venv using pyenv's Python 3.12.13: run 'pyenv shell 3.12.13 && python -m venv /projects/sandbox/FlightCardReader/.venv'

Install all project dependencies plus boto3: .venv/bin/pip install fastapi[standard] uvicorn[standard] 'sqlalchemy[asyncio]' aiosqlite httpx pydantic jinja2 Pillow rapidfuzz segno argon2-cffi itsdangerous pytest hypothesis boto3
Run the existing test suite: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -v
Confirm all tests pass (fix any environment issues if they don't)
acceptance_criteria: boto3 is importable from the venv
All existing tests pass with .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -v
findings: Used PYENV_VERSION=3.12.13 env var instead of 'pyenv shell' (shell integration not enabled). Also needed pytest-asyncio (not in Dockerfile but required by tests). 1 pre-existing test failure: test_file_handler_uses_append_mode (AttributeError on LogCaptureHandler.mode - unrelated to env setup). 411 of 412 tests pass.
